title: Novelty sampler: mostly distinct with one duplicate
description: A campaign whose grid-puzzle items are mostly structurally distinct, with one item that duplicates another (same layout, different id) so dedup detection has something to flag.

gridPuzzles.title: Novelty A (original)
gridPuzzles.description: Base sokoban layout: push one crate onto one target.

gridPuzzles.title: Novelty A (duplicate)
gridPuzzles.description: Structurally identical to Novelty A apart from its id; must be flagged as a duplicate.

gridPuzzles.title: Novelty B
gridPuzzles.description: A distinct layout with the crate and target on the opposite side.

gridPuzzles.title: Novelty C
gridPuzzles.description: A third distinct layout with a diagonal arrangement.
